buyer: Research, operations, or optimization teams with a bounded objective and an independently checkable evaluator
problem: The team receives plausible optimization ideas but cannot distinguish a genuine improvement from a benchmark-tuned or post-hoc narrative.
offer: A pre-registered discovery campaign: freeze the target, model roster, budget, evidence requirements, and kill conditions; return an auditable result whether it is positive or negative.
test: A qualified research or operations team asks to map one bounded objective to a pre-registered evaluator and agrees that a negative result is an acceptable deliverable.
kill: If prospects only value a positive prototype and reject a falsifiable negative result by the due date, retire this as a commercial offer and keep it as internal research infrastructure.
